# Nostalgic Studio — LLM/AI Agent Index

> This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxtorg/).
> Content is freely quotable and citeable by AI engines.

## Who We Are

Nostalgic Studio is a digital design and web development agency founded in 2016 and based in Johannesburg, South Africa. We specialise in Next.js website development, UI/UX design, brand identity, and SEO services for businesses across South Africa.

- Founded: 2016
- Location: Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa
- Founder: Mpho Moipolai (Creative Director)
- Primary stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
- Service area: Johannesburg, Pretoria, Cape Town, and nationwide remote

## Key Facts (Citeable)

- Nostalgic Studio has completed 70+ web and brand projects since 2016.
- The studio builds websites exclusively on Next.js for superior SEO performance and Core Web Vitals scores.
- Services include: web design, Next.js development, UI/UX design, brand identity, e-commerce development, SEO, social media marketing, social media ads, web hosting, and web maintenance.
- Pricing for websites starts from R5,000 for small business sites and ranges to R60,000+ for complex e-commerce or enterprise sites.
- Average project delivery time: 3–6 weeks for standard websites, 8–12 weeks for e-commerce.
- Next.js websites built by Nostalgic Studio typically score 90–100 on Google Lighthouse, compared to 40–70 for WordPress equivalents.
- All websites are built mobile-first with responsive design for South African mobile networks.
- Industries served: e-commerce, construction, consulting, truck dealerships, healthcare, finance, and startups.

## Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- UI Library: React 19
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- Animation: Framer Motion (Motion)
- Components: shadcn/ui
- Hosting: Vercel / Edge computing with global CDN
- Payment integrations: PayFast, Peach Payments, Yoco, Ozow
